pages.title: Spider
pages.text: $(rev)Corpus entry:$(warn) fragments torn from Spider donors keep their cultural locomotion hints even when stitched elsewhere.

pages.title: Stitcher's marginalia
pages.text: $(rev)Saddle-capable torso:$(warn) shears strip saddles like vanilla livestock — consult Dominion chapter for riding notes.$(br2)$(aside)Torso accepts saddles — surprise arachnid cavalry.$(br2)Leg tokens dictate skittering locomotion profiles.
